seo.title: Lyric Video Generator — AI-Powered, Free Online
seo.description: Generate lyric videos from your song. Upload audio, AI transcribes lyrics and syncs to the beat, generates visuals, preview and export — free, no subscription.

hero.badge: Lyric video generator — AI-powered, free to export
hero.subhead: Upload your song or paste a link. AI auto-transcribes the lyrics, syncs every line to the beat, and generates visuals driven by the song's mood. Preview the full lyric video, then export — free, no subscription needed.

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. No blank timeline, no video editing skills needed.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. AI also reads the song's mood to generate matching visuals.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video before publishing. Confirm every lyric lands on time and the visuals match the song's energy. Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. Free to export, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Generate Lyric Videos on LyricsVideo.ai
whyChoose.description: Traditional lyric video generators make you type lyrics and drag text on a timeline. LyricsVideo.ai starts from your audio — AI handles transcription, timing, and visuals. You just review and export.

highlight.title: From audio to finished video, AI handles the hard parts
highlight.description: Transcription, beat sync, and visual generation happen automatically. You review and adjust — you don't build from scratch.

cards.title: AI does the lyric work
cards.description: No typing, no pasting, no timeline dragging. Upload audio and get synced lyrics. The hardest part of generating a lyric video is already done.

cards.title: Minutes, not hours
cards.description: Traditional lyric video generators take hours of manual work. With AI transcription and beat sync, go from audio to finished video in minutes.

cards.title: Every format from one upload
cards.description: Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok and Reels, or 1:1 for feed posts. Generate one lyric video and cover every platform.

items.question: Is this lyric video generator free?
items.answer: Yes. Sign up, get free credits, and export your lyric video — no subscription required, no credit card needed.

items.question: Do I need to type the lyrics myself?
items.answer: No. Upload your audio and the AI transcribes every lyric line automatically, in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit if needed.

items.question: Can I generate lyric video from audio directly?
items.answer: Yes. Upload an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. The AI works directly from your audio, no preparation needed.

items.question: What formats can I export in?
items.answer: 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. All formats from one upload.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes — your exports are yours, including for monetized channels and paid releases. Make sure you have rights to the music you upload.

items.question: Is this different from a subtitle tool?
items.answer: Yes. A subtitle tool adds text over existing footage. A lyric video generator creates a complete video from audio — with transcription, beat sync, AI visuals, and multi-format export.

toolkit.title: Lyric Video Generator Use Cases
toolkit.description: One song becomes multiple lyric video assets — from full YouTube releases to short-form clips for every platform.

useCases.title: Independent artist releases
useCases.description: Generate a lyric video for your single without a designer, editor, or music video budget.

useCases.title: TikTok and Reels clips
useCases.description: Generate a vertical lyric video from the hook or chorus that stops the scroll.

useCases.title: YouTube lyric videos
useCases.description: Generate a full-length 16:9 lyric video that gives your audio upload more context than a static cover.

useCases.title: Release week content
useCases.description: Generate multiple lyric clips from one single — fresh content for every day of release week.

bottomCta.title: Your song already has everything it needs.
bottomCta.description: Upload your track, let AI handle the lyrics and visuals, and export a finished lyric video — free.
